rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MURIEL M SOFFER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 16, 2019. an amended petition was filed on 3/12/19 for a hearing on 3/19/19. an amended petition requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the petition it amends, which is 15 days. new notice must be mailed for the continued hearing date (on the mandatory form DE-121). in addition, new publication is required. the amended petition has been reviewed and clears most of the notes, however, a supplemental declaration is required that supplements #5 of the petition as follows: under subsection a, either box 1 or 2, AND either box 3 or 4 AND either box 5 or 6 AND either box 7 or 8 must be checked; and the appropriate allegation under subsection b must be made.
